verse_text: How long will sinners, O Lord, How long will sinners boast,

links.context: The "father" (v. 28) brought forth the Morning Star (i.e., Mazzaroth), which is Christ ([[REV.22:16]]), "when the fullness of the time had come" ([[GAL.4:4]]). The Lord lifted up His voice (v. 34) when the apostles, having been immersed in the rain of the Holy Spirit at Pentecost, preached the gospel to the world (see 1Kg 8:10, 11; [[PSA.93:3]]).
